case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES L.P. VS. SMALLAXE, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SMALLAXE, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES L.P.
